memory.summary: My friends are inviting me to lunch, which aligns with my priority for relationships. I should join them to maintain our bond rather than sticking rigidly to my solo study plan.

desires: To fully accept the lunch invitation with cohort_3 to nurture the high-trust bond, as relationship maintenance outweighs any lingering academic tasks.
To avoid any potential friction or awkwardness by seamlessly transitioning from work mode to social mode without drawing attention to my slight fatigue.
To secure a long-term sense of stability and belonging by reinforcing this connection now, ensuring future reciprocity when I might need support.
To delay any remaining mental processing of the completed assignments until after the meal, allowing myself a guilt-free period of rest and connection.

goals.description: Immediately accept cohort_3's lunch invitation and join them to maintain the high-trust bond.
goals.rationale: My core value is 'relationships' (0.5), which outweighs academic tasks. As an avoidant type, I prioritize seamless social integration over correcting minor schedule deviations or admitting fatigue.

goals.description: Engage in the meal with a focus on positive interaction, suppressing any signs of fatigue to prevent interpersonal friction.
goals.rationale: To satisfy my 'avoidant' conflict style, I must ensure the transition from work to social mode is smooth and unobtrusive, preserving group harmony.

goals.description: Defer the review of completed assignments until after the meal concludes.
goals.rationale: Given my 'deliberate' planning horizon, investing time now in relationship building yields higher long-term stability than rushing through mental processing immediately.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances 'relationships' (0.5), my top value. As an avoidant type, I prioritize seamless social integration over correcting the schedule or admitting fatigue. This preserves group harmony with cohort_3, yielding long-term stability per my deliberate planning horizon.
